# Data Analysis: Trends in Majors and Class Years

## Research Question
Do certain majors dominate the dataset, and are there trends across different class years?

## Overview
In this project, I analyzed survey data to explore how student majors are distributed and whether patterns exist across class years.

## Visualization
![Major Trends](your-image-file-name.png)

## Analysis
From the visualization, we can see that certain majors appear more frequently than others. Some majors show higher concentrations in specific class years, suggesting trends in popularity over time.

## Key Findings
- Certain majors dominate the dataset
- Some majors cluster around specific years
- There is variation in distribution across class years

## Conclusion
Overall, the data suggests that major selection is not evenly distributed and may vary depending on class year. These trends could reflect changes in academic interests or program growth over time.

## Future Work
Further analysis could explore why these trends exist, such as external factors like job market demand or curriculum changes.
